holdings.infoBox: CVNY is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax CVNA Option Income Strategy ETF (CVNY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Carvana stock (CVNA) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. CVNY was launched on Jan 29, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
